name: synapse-sdk
documentation:
This is the SDK to develop synapse plugins


## Internationalization

### Find Messages
```bash
 $ find . -name "*.py" | xargs xgettext -o messages.pot
```

### Make Messages
```bash
 $ msginit -l ko -i messages.pot -o synapse_sdk/locale/ko/LC_MESSAGES/messages.po
 $ msginit -l en -i messages.pot -o synapse_sdk/locale/en/LC_MESSAGES/messages.po
```

### Compile Messages

```bash
 $ msgfmt synapse_sdk/locale/ko/LC_MESSAGES/messages.po -o synapse_sdk/locale/ko/LC_MESSAGES/messages.mo
 $ msgfmt synapse_sdk/locale/en/LC_MESSAGES/messages.po -o synapse_sdk/locale/en/LC_MESSAGES/messages.mo
```

methods.name: synapse_sdk.plugins.categories.smart_tool.templates.plugin.auto_label.MyAutoLabel.handle_input
documentation: smart tool의 input을 model의 input 형태로 변환

methods.name: synapse_sdk.plugins.categories.smart_tool.templates.plugin.auto_label.MyAutoLabel.handle_output
documentation: model의 output을 smart tool의 output 형태로 변환

functions.name: synapse_sdk.utils.module_loading.import_string
documentation:
Import a dotted module path and return the attribute/class designated by the
last name in the path. Raise ImportError if the import failed.

functions.name: synapse_sdk.utils.pydantic.errors.pydantic_to_drf_error
documentation: Convert a pydantic ValidationError into a DRF-style error response.
